goal: Add input validation, type hints, error handling, and documentation to the calculator module
context: Simple Python calculator module. Four independent improvements, but error handling (task-3) depends on type hints (task-2) being in place first.

tasks.title: Add input validation
tasks.goal: Add runtime input validation to all calculator functions to reject non-numeric inputs.
acceptance: All functions raise TypeError for string inputs

tasks.title: Add type hints
tasks.goal: Add type hints to all function signatures in calculator.py and utils.py.
acceptance: All functions have parameter and return type annotations

tasks.title: Add error handling module
tasks.goal: Create src/errors.py with custom exception classes and update calculator to use them instead of built-in exceptions.
constraints: Custom exceptions must use typed attributes from task-2
acceptance: src/errors.py exists with custom exception classes

tasks.title: Add docstrings
tasks.goal: Add comprehensive docstrings to all functions in calculator.py and utils.py.
acceptance: All functions have docstrings with Args and Returns sections
